summary: Independent QA accepts the bounded M5 playable-slice definition as a planning-only contract. The task remains in REVIEW, writer and systems handoffs validate, the real origin/main...HEAD diff stays inside allowed project status/task/message/state paths, and no apps, packages, content-source, tools, .github, ADR, gate doc, roadmap, acceptance-matrix, manifest, checksum, validation-report, release, dependency, product-code, package-code, telemetry, server/multiplayer, arbitrary-code mod, branding, commercial, frozen-architecture, irreversible migration, or formal historical content scope was added.

tests_run.result: ## design/m5-slice-definition...origin/design/m5-slice-definition before QA handoff creation; no extra uncommitted diff. Earlier required status output on the same branch also showed only allowed project/status/message/state/task paths before the branch was confirmed clean.

Changed paths: PROJECT_STATUS.md; project/goal-mode-state.json; project/messages/outbox/GOAL-MODE-CONTINUATION.json; M5 slice start/writer/systems outbox handoffs; M5 slice route files; project/model-routing-state.json; project/tasks/active/M5-SLICE-DEFINITION-001.json; project/tasks/thread-registry.json.
M5-SLICE-DEFINITION-001 is REVIEW; M5-TASK-GRAPH-001 is CLOSED; M5 implementation, evidence, distributable, player-research, performance, manual-node-battle, and exit-human-gate tasks remain DRAFT.
No output while M5-SLICE-DEFINITION-001 is in REVIEW and downstream tasks remain dependency-gated.
VALID M5 task graph closure handoff.

tests_run.command: node -e JSON shape check for M5-SLICE-DEFINITION-001
tests_run.result: taskStatus=REVIEW; routeTo=qa_reviewer; writerStatus=REVIEW; systemsStatus=ACCEPT; required sections present; decisions=7; commands=27; readModels=19; replayEvidence=6; Human Gate and paid/accounts/secrets checks passed; thread statuses gameplay_designer=review, systems_architect=accepted, qa_reviewer=in_review.
Contract lists 27 required command surfaces and 19 required read models; missingCommands=[]; missingQueries=[] against packages/protocol/src/index.ts and packages/sim-core/src/command-query-v1.ts.

tests_run.command: node -e allowed-path and forbidden-path diff check

decisions: ACCEPT: M5-SLICE-DEFINITION-001 remains REVIEW and is not self-approved ACCEPTED/CLOSED. writer handoff is REVIEW, systems handoff is ACCEPT, and qa_reviewer route/state is present.

ACCEPT: The playable-slice contract satisfies the task acceptance criteria: it defines a repeatable 2-4 hour slice, start state, player goal, success/failure conditions, required command surfaces, required read models, replay/save/hash evidence, AI behavior, UI explanation needs, boundaries, invariants, parameters, and downstream acceptance evidence.

ACCEPT: Human Gates remain preserved for M5 formal passage, manual node battle, frozen product/platform/core architecture changes, telemetry, server/multiplayer, arbitrary-code mods, release/commercial decisions, branding, major cultural-risk decisions, irreversible migrations, and paid services/accounts/secrets.

ACCEPT: The contract is COMPOSITE_FICTIONAL_PLACEHOLDER and explicitly routes any real names, identities, claims, cultural symbols, art, music, language, or event content to historical_researcher before production.

ACCEPT: No formal historical content, production dependency, product code, package code, content-source data, release artifact, telemetry, server/multiplayer behavior, arbitrary-code mod support, branding, commercial decision, frozen architecture/platform/core decision, or irreversible migration was added.

ACCEPT: Independent command/read-model surface check confirms systems_architect's conclusion: the listed surfaces are already present in protocol/sim-core and do not imply obvious hidden protocol or save-format expansion inside this task.

ACCEPT: Downstream implementation remains gated. M5-SIM-PLAYABLE-LOOP-001, M5-CLIENT-PLAYABLE-UI-001, M5-WEB-WINDOWS-DISTRIBUTABLE-001, M5-MULTIYEAR-AI-RUN-001, M5-PERFORMANCE-GATE-001, M5-PLAYER-RESEARCH-001, M5-MANUAL-NODE-BATTLE-DECISION-001, and M5-EXIT-HUMAN-GATE-001 remain DRAFT.
risks: Non-blocking state hygiene risk: PROJECT_STATUS.md and project/goal-mode-state.json still contain local next-action wording that names systems review, while GOAL-MODE-CONTINUATION.json, route files, task route_to, and thread state correctly show QA review routed after systems ACCEPT. Lead integration should refresh this wording when integrating QA acceptance.

Downstream implementation tasks must not treat this contract as approval for new protocol, save migration, content-source, UI formula duplication, release/commercial, telemetry, server, account, paid-service, secret, dependency, or Human Gate scope. Any insufficient accepted surface must be routed through the owning downstream task and systems_architect review.

Session length, map scale, in-game duration, AI multi-year duration, and comprehension targets remain starting hypotheses until M5 sim, client, AI, performance, and player-research tasks produce evidence.
requested_action: Integrate QA ACCEPT, refresh any stale next-action status wording during lead integration, and keep M5 formal passage/manual node battle/downstream implementation tasks gated until their own tasks and Human Gates pass.
